notes: AMC-based colour coding (green/yellow/red) added to Requisition & Reporting forms
Analytics module load time improved by ~40%
Fixed equipment inventory sync issue with Facility Edition
Added export-to-Excel on all report grids
Batch number and expiry date now shown on every commodity line
Stock-below-minimum alert widget added to dashboard
Offline-first stock counts with background sync
Barcode scanning for lowest pack size

userGuides.title: Data Analytics & Supply Chain Portal Guide

reportCatalogue.name: Facilities Reported / Not Reported
reportCatalogue.description: Tracks which facilities submitted or missed their R&R for the period

reportCatalogue.name: Reporting Rate Summary
reportCatalogue.description: Percentage of facilities that reported within a defined period, by district

reportCatalogue.name: Stock Status Graph
reportCatalogue.description: Visualizes stock levels over time per commodity and facility

reportCatalogue.name: Consumption Trend Graph
reportCatalogue.description: Shows consumption quantities across reporting periods for forecasting

reportCatalogue.name: Stock Status Map
reportCatalogue.description: Colour-coded geographic view of facility stock levels across Zambia

reportCatalogue.name: Requisition & Report (R&R)
reportCatalogue.description: Primary logistics document: balances, receipts, issues, and order quantity

reportCatalogue.name: Average Monthly Consumption (AMC)
reportCatalogue.description: Calculates AMC per commodity/facility — the basis for order quantities

reportCatalogue.name: Months of Stock (MOS) Report
reportCatalogue.description: Stock remaining at current consumption rates per facility

reportCatalogue.name: Lab Equipment Functionality
reportCatalogue.description: Reports on functional status of lab equipment for maintenance planning

reportCatalogue.name: Expiry Report
reportCatalogue.description: Lists commodities approaching or past expiry — prevents wastage

relatedSystems.title: QAT Tool
relatedSystems.description: Modernized solution for country-led forecasting and supply planning, used alongside eLMIS for national quantification cycles.

relatedSystems.title: WHXpert WMS
relatedSystems.description: Warehouse management system assisting with daily warehouse and hub operations at ZAMMSA.

relatedSystems.title: eLMIS CHW App
relatedSystems.description: Android application for Community Health Workers and satellite sites, integrated with Facility Edition data.

tools.title: CHW / Satellite Site Mobile App (Android)
tools.description: Offline-capable stock reporting app for community health workers and satellite sites.

tools.title: Barcode Scanner Configuration Tool
tools.description: Utility for pairing handheld barcode scanners with Facility Edition for lowest-pack-size tracking.

tools.title: Offline Data Validation Tool
tools.description: Desktop tool to validate R&R exports before upload when connectivity is limited.
